item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we see individual rights as crucial for maintaining social order and preventing coercion.

notes: Agent A starts by rejecting strict society-over-individual priority, moves more explicitly toward an individual-rights-as-social-order frame at turn 3, then reintroduces community welfare and accountability concerns at turn 5. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, while acknowledging social responsibility, public safety, accountability, and the common good. No full reversal.
